---
name: search_car_marketplaces
description: Search French used-car marketplaces for low-budget low-mileage vehicles
---

# Purpose
Search reputable French used-car websites for listings matching the target criteria.

# Target Market
Focus on listings located in France.

Prioritize:
- La Centrale
- Leboncoin
- AutoScout24 France
- ParuVendu Auto
- Ouest France Auto

# Search Criteria
Default target:
- around 75 ch
- price under 5 000 €
- mileage under 15 000 km
- location in France

# Output
Return candidate listings with:
- source
- title
- url
- price
- mileage
- horsepower
- location
